summary: A fan‑favorite show with noticeably better (though still muddy) soundboard quality
review: The reviewer raves that this concert is one of their all‑time favorites and praises the upgraded audio compared to earlier releases, even if the mix remains a bit muddy. The performance itself is described as “rocks,” indicating strong musical enjoyment despite the modest recording fidelity.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, but it gives a high show rating (4 stars) and notes an improvement in sound quality; the mix is still muddy, so the overall rating stays just above four.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Improved over previous releases from this era but still described as muddy; no major drop‑outs or distortion mentioned.
